title: stelis crassilabia
intro: Stelis crassilabia, also known as Stelis, is a species of orchid native to Mexico and parts of Central America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Stelis crassilabia are said to include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, Stelis crassilabia is often used as a tincture or tea, and is sometimes combined with other plants to enhance its medicinal properties.
